userMessage: Set CH1 scale to 200mV and offset to 0 using tm_devices

response.text:
I built a verified tm_devices flow that sets CH1 scale to 0.2 V/div and offset to 0.

ACTIONS_JSON: {"summary":"Create a new tm_devices scope flow that sets CH1 scale to 200 mV and offset to 0 using verified tm_devices calls.","findings":["Verified tm_devices calls were materialized for ch[1].scale.write and ch[1].offset.write on the MSO4/5/6 family."],"suggestedFixes":["Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.","Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias \"scope1\" for direct chat apply compatibility."],"actions":[{"type":"replace_flow","flow":{"name":"Set CH1 Scale and Offset","description":"Set CH1 scale to 200 mV/div and offset to 0 using tm_devices.","backend":"tm_devices","deviceType":"SCOPE","steps":[{"type":"connect","label":"Connect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"],"printIdn":true},"id":"s1_1"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set CH1 Scale to 200 mV","params":{"code":"scope.commands.ch[1].scale.write(\"0.2\")","model":"MSO4/5/6 Series","description":"Set CH1 vertical scale to 0.2 V/div using verified tm_devices call."},"id":"s1_2"},{"type":"tm_device_command","label":"Set CH1 Offset to 0","params":{"code":"scope.commands.ch[1].offset.write(0)","model":"MSO4/5/6 Series","description":"Set CH1 vertical offset to 0 using verified tm_devices call."},"id":"s1_3"},{"type":"disconnect","label":"Disconnect","params":{"instrumentIds":["scope1"]},"id":"s1_4"}]}}]}

actionsJson.summary: Create a new tm_devices scope flow that sets CH1 scale to 200 mV and offset to 0 using verified tm_devices calls.
findings: Verified tm_devices calls were materialized for ch[1].scale.write and ch[1].offset.write on the MSO4/5/6 family.
suggestedFixes: Auto-repaired missing/duplicate step ids in replace_flow actions for apply compatibility.
Filled connect/disconnect instrumentIds with workspace alias "scope1" for direct chat apply compatibility.

flow.name: Set CH1 Scale and Offset
flow.description: Set CH1 scale to 200 mV/div and offset to 0 using tm_devices.

params.description: Set CH1 vertical scale to 0.2 V/div using verified tm_devices call.
Set CH1 vertical offset to 0 using verified tm_devices call.
